{{Quote|Between the explosive end of the dread DEATH STAR…and the moment when the evil GALACTIC EMPIRE struck back on the ice planet of HOTH…MANY adventures befell the Star Warriors of the Rebel Alliance. This is ONE of them…|''Classic Star Wars 1''|<ref name="CSW1">''Classic Star Wars 1''</ref>}}
'''''Classic Star Wars'' 1''' is the first issue of ''[[Classic Star Wars]]''. The comic reproduces the first half of "[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]," a [[1981]] [[Star Wars (comic strip)|newspaper comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and illustrated by [[Al Williamson]]. While the majority of the original comic strip was unchanged, Williamson supplied ''Classic Star Wars 1'' with new panels, extended artwork, an entirely new story page, and original cover art. In [[2015]], [[Marvel Comics]] published a digital edition under the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] banner.

==Publisher's summary==
''The events in ''Classic Star Wars'' take place between the first and second ''Star Wars'' films, and each issue is jam-packed with action. Our debut issue is no exception: Luke and Leia embark on a scouting mission, are pursued by Imperial troops, and fall into the clutches of a bounty hunter whose real target is Han Solo! Whew! The whole shebang is written by Archie Goodwin, drawn by Al Williamson, and colored by Steve Buccellato, with a new cover by Williamson.''<ref name="Dark Horse" />
